title: Darlac Telescopic Hedge Shear - Extendable Handles Adjust to Exact Length Required - Super Lightweight Approx 1kg - Razor Sharp Blade Ideal for Hedge Trimming, Green Growth & Light Woody Growth
features: DARLAC FLIP LOCK TELESCOPIC HEDGE SHEAR – Incredibly lightweight and ideal for all green and light woody growth. With a tension adjuster, easy-to-extend handles and shock-absorbing buffers to reduce jarring, you can enjoy the perfect cut every time

EASE OF USE – Designed for more effortless gardening, our hedge shears also feature wavy-edged blades to trap growth during cutting, while the P.T.F.E.coating reduces friction. Ergonomic oval profile handles provide you with a comfortable grip

RELIABLE AND DURABLE – We've built our Flip Lock Telescopic Hedge Shear to last. With the right care, oiling, cleaning and sharpening, our garden shears can last a lifetime. Replacement blades are available.

DESIGN INNOVATION - Darlac brings award-winning ideas and innovation to the world of gardening. Using our expertise to add ingenious and thoughtful touches to standard garden tools, we design and make products that are indispensable to any gardener

DARLAC GARDEN TOOLS – With over 55 years of cutting excellence, Darlac has built an unrivalled reputation for quality, service, and value with one of the widest ranges of cutting tools and gardening equipment available to the gardener today
description: From the manufacturer Over 55 years of innovation! The Darlac Tool Company was founded in 1963, and since then has built a reputation for quality and value for money. After years of new and innovative product introduction, Darlac now has one of the widest ranges of cutting tools, hand tools, and watering equipment available to the gardener today – all backed by a dedication to quality. Darlac Telescopic Hedge Shear Ergonomically designed shears of exceptional quality & comfort The Darlac Telescopic Hedge Shear is an ergonomically designed cutting tool of exceptional quality. With extendable handles that can be adjusted to the perfect length for any job, keeping your garden hedges neat and tidy has never been easier! This telescopic shear also features oval profile handles for a comfortable grip and helpful wavy blades that trap growth. When you're finished, simply retract the handles for easy storage. Telescopic and lightweight - weighing just over 1kg Extendable handles with a 670mm to 880mm range Easily sharpened carbon steel wavy blades Ideal for hedge trimming, green growth and light woody
